textByHash.3540c8194c8968dfc8be180ce68d2bab003c4cf0: Welcome to Lowe's Archery Emporium. Do you want to see my wares?
textByHash.72995dfb67ad898e713a5c4746e015c7aa5b5d16: I will be able to give you your reward when you have some space for it.
textByHash.44d70a64ca94ba66b9c8df940be19b73b0ed6564: Why yes, here are some high-quality iron arrows.
textByHash.06dfed200286c072e19baee7465900f797898323: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.
textByHash.cb84e58f167eb024c3acda1c718df2a82336cad6: Since you are a member, I'll also give you extra arrows and one of my finest bows.
textByHash.df60a12f8541ac040cfdf20ec74c762cb4a10bb7: I sell a variety of range equipment in my shop if you wanted to take a look.
textByHash.95a446e9e46949e3e3643bcf83638312633b7ad5: Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.0142a4be2ecc6612fa19b2ed3a6d5d9835475aab: I do have more rewards for you, but you need some free space for me to give you the rewards.
textByHash.00b4a6dbd440955e826052b8a994bb28e351ed04: Can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.e08205096c9db9fd664abbca298959c1a47ea824: Why yes, here is one of my finest bows and some high- quality iron arrows.
